input: Create a tRPC endpoint for listing projects with pagination

Build a service function for reserving credits with atomic transaction safety

Add rate limiting middleware using Redis cache store
Create a Zod z.object validation schema for user profile updates with optional fields
Implement a BullMQ Job processor for sending email notification events
Add a tRPC query to get a single task by ID with orgId multi-tenant scoping
Create a service to upload files to a MinIO S3 bucket
Implement cursor-based pagination for Drizzle select queries with limit
Build a webhook receiver endpoint that verifies request signatures
Create a database migration for adding an index on the createdAt table column
Add soft delete to the projects table with a deletedAt timestamp column
Implement a Redis caching layer for frequently accessed project data
Create an audit log service that inserts records for all mutation events
Build a health check endpoint that verifies database and Redis status
Add Zod z.string input validation with min and max length limits
Create a tRPC subscription for real-time task status update events
Implement multi-tenant row-level security with orgId scoping on sessions
Build a batch import mutation endpoint that parses and inserts CSV data in a transaction
